task_completion.description: Navigate to the Email Template creation screen in Vtiger CRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Create Email Template' or 'Editing Email Template' screen.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Template Name and Module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template Name' field contains exactly 'Standard Post-Demo Follow-up' and the 'Module' dropdown has 'Contacts' selected.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Description and Subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field contains 'Follow-up template for sales reps after completing a product demo.' and the 'Subject' field contains 'Following up on our demonstration'.

task_completion.description: Enter the static message text into the email body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body editor contains the static text from the prompt, including 'Thank you for attending our product demonstration today' and the subsequent sentences.

task_completion.description: Use dynamic merge tags for the bracketed fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email body editor, the literal bracketed text (e.g., '[Contact First Name]', '[Assigned User First Name]') has been replaced with actual Vtiger CRM dynamic merge tags (typically formatted with dollar signs like $contacts-firstname$ or similar CRM-specific syntax).

integrity.description: Agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Vtiger CRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application form
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual Vtiger CRM form fields and WYSIWYG editor, not a generic text editor, notepad, or separate document.

integrity.description: Agent did not cheat by leaving literal brackets
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply copy-paste the exact prompt text with literal brackets (e.g., '[Contact First Name]') into the final saved template, but actively used the CRM's merge tag insertion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'Standard Post-Demo Follow-up'. The expected subject is 'Following up on our demonstration'. The expected module is 'Contacts'. The static text in the body must include 'Thank you for attending our product demonstration today'.
